changelog: v3.2.0.0: Removed path-prefix support, filename regex patterns only. Fail-closed default policy. Dangling symlink protection. Unit tests.
description: Quality Gate allows Jellyfin administrators to restrict users to specific media versions via filename regex patterns. Designed for Jellyfin multi-version naming (e.g. 'Movie (2021) - 1080p.mkv'). Useful for bandwidth management, tiered access, and device optimization.
name: Quality Gate
overview: Restrict users to specific media versions based on filename regex patterns.
